title: Fairness-constrained ranking rule
prompt: A platform selects ranking weights to maximize predicted engagement subject to a minimum exposure constraint for two creator groups. Group labels and predicted scores are supplied at ranking time. The model constrains exposure but does not model creator welfare. Frame the governance choice precisely.

model_specification.mechanism: Ranking weights reallocate positions and predicted attention while the exposure constraint limits group disparity.

fidelity_requirements: Fairness means the specified exposure constraint
Do not equate exposure with welfare
